notes: Iteration 1: ch02 was NOT edited (it remains the single source of truth and retains all canonical RNN/LSTM/attention/multihead derivations). The companion ch01 SSOT edit removed ch01's duplicate derivations and colliding labels, lifting ch02's cross-chapter scores: notation_crossref 48->68, non_repetition 55->78. Both still below 90 due to ch02's OWN remaining issues (7 other duplicate labels, 15 hard-coded Chapter~N refs, stub demo.ipynb, fabricated tab:roadmap), which are out of scope for the ch01/ch02 SSOT pass. Original audit (iteration 0): Audit only, iteration 0. Mathematically excellent, finance-first chapter (correctness of derivations, finance examples, and finance orientation are release-grade). It is blocked from passing by four BLOCKER-class defects, three of which are book-wide: (1) demo.ipynb is a stub referenced 6x; (2) the chapter-roadmap table tab:roadmap is fabricated relative to the real main.tex TOC; (3) 12 \label collisions with ch01; (4) ch01 duplicates the RNN/attention/LSTM derivations this chapter is meant to own as SSOT. Plus 15 forbidden hard-coded Chapter~N refs and a duplicate wei2022emergent bib key. citation_accuracy capped at 89 pending external verification of two quantitative claims.
